caption: A news broadcast features a scene of a crowd gathered outdoors. A man in a white shirt is centrally positioned, gesturing with his hands while surrounded by other people. Behind him, individuals are holding large flags, including one with a green, white, and orange design and another with a red and white pattern. The screen is filled with news graphics, including the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo and a red banner at the bottom that reads "BREAKING NEWS". Above this, a headline asks "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". Small inset portraits of several men appear on the sides, accompanied by names such as "डिप्टी CM", "सुब्रत चौधरी", "विजय सिन्हा", "मंत्री", "विजेन्द्र यादव", and "श्रवण कुमार". As the sequence progresses, the man in the white shirt continues to move and speak, while the graphics and text remain largely consistent, with slight shifts in the positioning of the "BREAKING NEWS" text.
